title: Evar Orbus and His Galactic Jizz-Wailers

'''Evar Orbus and His Galactic Jizz-Wailers''' were a [[Jizz/Legends|jizz]] [[Band/Legends|band]] founded by [[Evar Orbus/Legends|Evar Orbus]], featuring [[Max Rebo/Legends|Max Rebo]], [[Sy Snootles/Legends|Sy Snootles]], and [[Droopy McCool/Legends|Droopy McCool]]. <ref name="And the Band Played On" />Their hits included "[[(That Joyous Night) I Ate My Mate/Legends|(That Joyous Night) I Ate My Mate]]."

When playing at [[Uncle Chesko's]] on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]], the band was surprised to find their set interrupted by the song stylings of the [[Yuzzum/Legends|Yuzzum]] [[Joh Yowza/Legends|J'ywz'gnk Kchhllbrxcstk Et'nrmdndlcvtbrx]]. Impressed, Orbus invited him to join the band, giving him the stage name Joh Yowza.

When Orbus was [[Death/Legends|killed]] in a firefight with [[Figrin D'an and the Modal Nodes/Legends|Figrin D'an and the Modal Nodes]], the remaining members reformed the group into the [[Max Rebo Band/Legends|Max Rebo Band]]. The Max Rebo Band later played one of the Wailers' hits, "[[Jedi Rocks/Legends|Jedi Rocks]].<ref name="ROTJ">{{Film|VI}}</ref>
